title: Imphal、Manipur — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Imphal、Manipur的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Imphal是Manipur的一個城市，人口約500,000。The capital of Manipur, a scenic valley city surrounded by hills, known for its classical dance, polo origins, and Loktak Lake.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
